title: Velvet Croatian Lentil Soup
description: A silky, herbal lentil soup with a bright vinaigrette finish, perfect for a comforting lunch.

ingredients.name: vinaigrette
ingredients.amount: 1 tablespoon olive oil + 1 tablespoon apple cider vinegar + 1 tablespoon lemon juice + pinch sugar

instructions: Rinse lentils under cold water and set aside.
Heat 1 tablespoon olive oil in a large pot over medium heat. Add diced onion, celery, and minced garlic; sauté until onion is translucent, about 5 minutes.
Stir in 1 teaspoon paprika and the mixed oregano & thyme; cook for another minute until fragrant.

Add the lentils, vegetable broth, and bay leaf. Bring the mixture to a boil, then reduce to a gentle simmer, cover, and cook for 20–25 minutes, or until the lentils are tender and the soup has thickened.
Remove the bay leaf and season the soup with salt and pepper to taste.
Using an immersion blender, puree about half of the soup directly in the pot until velvety smooth; return to heat and keep warm.
Taste and adjust seasoning as needed.
Divide the soup into bowls. Drizzle each bowl with the prepared vinaigrette and garnish with remaining chopped parsley & dill.
Serve hot, optionally with crusty bread.
